headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 14, 2026**
article:
The Seattle Mariners took down the Houston Astros 6-2, with Josh Naylor leading the Astros' offense with 2 hits and 2 home runs. The Baltimore Orioles secured a 7-9 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Jeremiah Jackson leading the charge at the plate. The Washington Nationals fell to the Pittsburgh Pirates 16-5 in a one-sided matchup, and the Chicago Cubs suffered a 13-7 loss to the Philadelphia Phillies.

Several players have been impacted by injuries and availability. Ryan Pepiot, a right-handed pitcher for the Tampa Bay Rays, has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to right hip inflammation. Joey Gerber, a right-handed pitcher for the New York Mets, has been placed on the 15-day injured list with a right finger blister. Johan Oviedo, a right-handed pitcher for the Boston Red Sox, has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list with a right elbow strain.

The Philadelphia Phillies have made a roster move ahead of Friday's game, trading RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for Future Considerations and International Bonus Pool Money. The Baltimore Orioles have acquired 1B Christian Encarnacion-Strand from the Cincinnati Reds in exchange for cash. The Chicago White Sox have traded 2B Lenyn Sosa to the Toronto Blue Jays in exchange for OF Jordan Rich and Future Considerations.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Mariners in 6-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners took down the Houston Astros 6-2, with Josh Naylor leading the Astros' offense with 2 hits and 2 home runs.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall to Orioles in Thrilling 7-9 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 7-9 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Jeremiah Jackson leading the charge at the plate. Jackson's impressive performance included three hits, two home runs, and five RBIs, while Dean Kremer pitched 5.0 innings with 9 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Suffer Blowout Loss to Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals fell to the Pittsburgh Pirates 16-5 in a one-sided matchup. Paul Skenes led the Pirates' pitching staff with 6.0 innings pitched, 6 strikeouts, and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Cubs Fall to Phillies in Blowout**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs suffered a 13-7 loss to the Philadelphia Phillies, with Kyle Schwarber leading the Phillies' offense going 2-for-3 with 2 home runs and 3 RBIs. Cristopher Sánchez earned the win for the Phillies, pitching 6.0 innings with 8 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Ryan Pepiot Transferred to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Tampa Bay Rays right-handed pitcher Ryan Pepiot has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to right hip inflammation. This move will keep Pepiot sidelined for an extended period.

top_news.title: **Phillies Make Roster Move Ahead of Friday's Game**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies have traded RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for Future Considerations and International Bonus Pool Money.
